purpose: Rotating SearXNG SERP queries for Corsair discovery. These are search-result leads only — not HTML body scrapes. Full crawl of blackwomenleadproject.org remains gated on source-policy audit (repo-tt2u.13).

Rotating SearXNG SERP queries for Corsair discovery. These are search-result leads only — not HTML body scrapes. Full crawl of blackwomenleadproject.org remains gated on source-policy audit (repo-tt2u.13). 2026-07-22 wave adds firsts / plantations / uprisings / state pioneers to cast a broader net.

safeties.livingPersonNote: Black Women Lead and living officeholders/firsts: treat SERP hits as leads, never harvest private contact data; living persons stay privacy_review.
